description: It tangles any moving thing with its vines. Their subtle shaking is ticklish if you get ensnared.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Mega Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Tangela

description: Its vines grow so profusely that, in the warm season, you can't even see its eyes.

attacks.name: Leaf Storm
attacks.effect: Heal 40 damage from each of your Grass Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flog
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Tangrowth

description: It drifts on winds. It is said that when Hoppip gather in fields and mountains, spring is on the way.
name: Hoppip

description: It spreads its petals to absorb sunlight. It also floats in the air to get closer to the sun.
name: Skiploom

description: Even in the fiercest wind, it can control its fluff to make its way to any place in the world it wants.

attacks.name: Fluffy Transport
attacks.effect: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Solar Step
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the number of your remaining Prize cards.

name: Jumpluff

description: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter windows in the area.

attacks.name: Scout
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand.

name: Yanma

description: This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.

abilities.name: Sonic Vision
abilities.effect: If you have exactly 4 cards in your hand, ignore all Energy in the attack cost of each of this Pokémon's attacks.

attacks.name: Assault Boom
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 70 more damage.

name: Yanmega

attacks.name: Barrier Break
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

description: When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bide
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, if this Pokémon would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's next turn, it is not Knocked Out and its remaining HP becomes 10 instead.

name: Seedot

description: It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon would be damaged by an attack, prevent that attack's damage done to this Pokémon if that damage is 60 or less.

name: Nuzleaf

description: By flapping its leafy fan, it can whip up gusts of 100 ft/second that can level houses.

attacks.name: Extrasensory
attacks.effect: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Shiftry

description: It lures Pokémon with its pattern that looks just like a Poké Ball then releases poison spores.

abilities.name: Play Ball
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench, you may put 3 Poké Ball cards from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Foongus

description: It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion.

attacks.name: Crazy Spore

attacks.name: Strange Reaction
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Confused, it is now Paralyzed.

name: Amoonguss

description: The base of volcanoes is where they make their homes. They shoot fire from their five horns to repel attacking enemies.
name: Larvesta

description: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona's fire provided a replacement for the sun.

attacks.name: Shimmering Scales
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Power Hurricane
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Volcarona

description: Its legs grow strong while it chases after its parent. It runs in fields and mountains all day.

attacks.name: Returning Flames
attacks.effect: Put 2 Fire Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Ponyta

description: It gallops at nearly 150 mph. With its mane blazing ferociously, it races as if it were an arrow.

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Rapidash

attacks.name: Ember

name: Chimchar

description: It uses ceilings and walls to launch aerial attacks. Its fiery tail is but one weapon.

description: They set off on their own from their pride and live by themselves to become stronger. These hot-blooded Pokémon are quick to fight.

description: With fiery breath of more than 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, they viciously threaten any challenger. The females protect the pride's cubs.

name: Volcanion

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.
